creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
Hi Daniel,

Unfortunately this patch breaks XML support in science/abinit.

This line changed in the abinit's configure log:
> - checking whether the XMLF90 Fortran interface works... yes
> + checking whether the XMLF90 Fortran interface works... no
> + configure: WARNING: invalid XMLF90 configuration


Yuri
